name: Chili Stack
recipeInstructions:
1. Add shortening to a skillet and heat to medium high.
2. When the shortening is browned, add meat and cook until crumbly.
3. Blend flour through the mixture.
4. Add remaining ingredients, except cheese. Lower heat to simmer.
5. Cook for 30 minutes.
6. Just before serving, stir in cheese. Delicious served on toast. Serves 4 to 5.
